# ddftemps

## What is ddftemps?
ddftemps is a platform for creating stunning, interactive digital greeting experiences. Users create personalized birthday cards, anniversary tributes, Valentine's messages, and other special occasion greetings that are delivered as a simple shareable link.

## How it works
1. Choose a template for the occasion (birthday, anniversary, Valentine's, etc.)
2. Fill in a form with names, photos, personal messages, relationship milestones
3. Get a unique link to share with the recipient
4. The recipient opens the link and experiences a beautiful, animated, multi-page greeting with scroll animations, photo galleries, love letters, and interactive elements

## Key features
- Interactive Yes/No intro page where the No button shrinks when clicked
- Animated scroll experience with 9 personalized pages
- Photo memory gallery in polaroid scrapbook style
- Personal love letter section
- Relationship timeline with milestones
- Works on any device via browser, no app download needed
- Cards stay live for 30 days

## Available templates
- For Girlfriend (Birthday) - romantic, warm, blush pink and gold
- For Boyfriend (Birthday) - coming soon
- For Best Friend (Birthday) - coming soon
- For Mom (Birthday) - coming soon
- Anniversary - coming soon
- Valentine's Day - coming soon

## Pricing
Single cards range from $10 to $15 depending on the template.

## Contact
Website: https://eclectic-kangaroo-adac15.netlify.app/
